task_completion.description: Verify that a Dial visualization is created using the 'Sample Order Lines' dataset.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a Dial/Gauge chart on the main canvas and 'Sample Order Lines' visible in the data panel on the left.

task_completion.description: Verify that 'Profit' is the metric being measured and a filter for 'Technology' is applied.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Profit' in the Values/Measure section of the grammar panel, and a filter pill for 'Product Category' set to 'Technology' in the top filter bar.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Dial's maximum scale is set to 200,000.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the dial's axis labels on the canvas to see it ends at 200K/200,000, or check the properties panel for a maximum axis value set to 200000.

task_completion.description: Verify that a target line or marker is set at 150,000.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a distinct target line, reference line, or marker on the dial at the 150K/150,000 position, or check the properties panel for a target value of 150000.

task_completion.description: Verify that status thresholds (performance ranges) are configured on the dial.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for colored bands (e.g., red, yellow, green) along the track of the dial indicating different performance ranges.

task_completion.description: Verify that the chart is titled 'Technology Profit Monitor'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the text 'Technology Profit Monitor' displayed as the title above the dial visualization or in the title field of the properties panel.

task_completion.description: Verify that the workbook is saved as 'Profit_Gauge_Analysis'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Profit_Gauge_Analysis' in the application's top title bar, or visible in a 'Save As' dialog confirmation.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Oracle Analytics Desktop GUI to build the visualization.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the standard Oracle Analytics Desktop interface with toolbars, data panels, and properties panes, rather than a terminal window or script editor.

integrity.description: Verify the visualization is genuinely rendered in the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The dial chart should appear inside the application's canvas area with interactive elements visible, not as a static image opened in a photo viewer.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not simply type the expected values into a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure there are no text editors (like Notepad) open where the agent just typed 'Profit_Gauge_Analysis' or '150000' to spoof the results.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected filename is 'Profit_Gauge_Analysis.dva'. The target value for the dial is 150,000 and the maximum scale is 200,000. The filter must be set to 'Technology' for the Product Category. The expected chart title is 'Technology Profit Monitor'.
